episodes.title: IIT Graduate Turned ‘Spiritual Guru’ Arrested Over Exploitation and Blackmail Allegations
episodes.description:
IITରୁ ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ଗୁରୁ । ଭକ୍ତି ନାଁରେ ଯୁବତୀଙ୍କୁ ଶୋଷଣ ଅଭିଯୋଗ । ବ୍ଲାକମେଲ୍ ର ଭୟଙ୍କର ଖେଳ । ଧରା ପଡିଗଲା ଖେଳ, ବନ୍ଧା ହେଲେ IIT ବାବା । ମହିଳାଙ୍କର ଅନ୍ତରଙ୍ଗ ଫଟୋ ଓ ଭିଡିଓ ରେକର୍ଡ କରି ବ୍ଲାକମେଲ୍  କରୁଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗରେ ମଥୁରାରୁ ଗିରଫ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଅଭିଷେକ ମିଶ୍ର । 
#IITBaba #AbhishekMishra #BreakingNews #MathuraPolice #CrimeNews #SpiritualGuru #BlackmailCase #OdishaNews #Chhattisgarh #IITRoorkee #IndiaNews #SexualExploitation #LatestNews #CrimeAlert #YouTubeGuru #OTV 

A shocking case of alleged exploitation under the guise of spirituality has come to light with the arrest of an Odisha-based man who projected himself as a spiritual guru. Abhishek Mishra, popularly known as Adikarta Narayan Das, has been arrested by Mathura Police following serious allegations of sexual exploitation and blackmail.
